title: setaria braunii
intro: Setaria braunii, also known as False Bristle Grass, is a type of plant native to tropical Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Setaria braunii can be prepared in various forms, including herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
